services.name: Residential Ground Fog System — Standard
services.description: Complete low-lying fog system for residential outdoor spaces. Produces a dense, ground-hugging fog layer up to 14 inches deep using chilled glycol-based fluid dispersed through buried PVC manifold lines with brass micro-nozzles. Designed for permanent installation with year-round operation capability.

specifications.fog_depth: 6 to 14 inches above grade, adjustable via controller
specifications.fluid_type: Pharma-grade propylene glycol blend, non-toxic, pet-safe
specifications.water_connection: Standard 3/4-inch garden hose bib within 50 feet of control unit
specifications.control_unit_dimensions: 36 x 24 x 18 inches, weather-rated NEMA 4X enclosure
specifications.manifold_depth: 4 inches below grade in schedule 40 PVC

eligibility.minimum_clear_area: 1,500 square feet of contiguous outdoor space
eligibility.maximum_grade: Property grade must not exceed 6 percent slope within the installation zone
eligibility.drainage_requirement: Installation zone must have positive drainage away from structures — standing water after rainfall disqualifies the area

setback_requirements.pool_or_water_feature: Minimum 10 feet from any pool edge, spa, or open water feature
setback_requirements.hvac_intake: Minimum 15 feet from any HVAC outdoor intake or return vent
setback_requirements.structure_foundation: Minimum 4 feet from any structure foundation or slab edge

price_range.includes: Site survey, manifold trenching, nozzle installation, control unit, initial fluid charge, programming, and commissioning
price_range.excludes: Electrical circuit installation (by licensed electrician), any required drainage correction, permit fees

services.name: Residential Ground Fog System — Premium
services.description: Enhanced ground fog system with multi-zone control, color-integrated LED ground lighting, smartphone app control, and weather-responsive automation. Uses the same chilled glycol dispersal technology as the Standard system with additional control sophistication and aesthetic integration.

specifications.coverage_area: 1,200 to 5,000 square feet across up to 4 independent zones
specifications.fog_depth: 4 to 18 inches above grade, independently adjustable per zone
specifications.fluid_type: Pharma-grade propylene glycol blend, non-toxic, pet-safe
specifications.water_connection: Standard 3/4-inch garden hose bib within 50 feet of control unit
specifications.control_unit_dimensions: 42 x 30 x 24 inches, weather-rated NEMA 4X enclosure
specifications.manifold_depth: 4 inches below grade in schedule 40 PVC
smart_features: integration with Alexa and Google Home
specifications.lighting: Integrated RGBW LED ground wash per zone, 12V low-voltage, independently programmable

eligibility.minimum_clear_area: 2,000 square feet of contiguous outdoor space
eligibility.maximum_grade: Property grade must not exceed 6 percent slope within the installation zone
eligibility.drainage_requirement: Installation zone must have positive drainage away from structures — standing water after rainfall disqualifies the area
eligibility.wifi_requirement: Reliable Wi-Fi signal at control unit location required for smart features

setback_requirements.pool_or_water_feature: Minimum 10 feet from any pool edge, spa, or open water feature
setback_requirements.hvac_intake: Minimum 15 feet from any HVAC outdoor intake or return vent
setback_requirements.structure_foundation: Minimum 4 feet from any structure foundation or slab edge

price_range.base_installation: $8,500 to $16,400 depending on coverage area and zone count
price_range.includes: Site survey, multi-zone manifold trenching, nozzle installation, control unit with smart hub, LED lighting, initial fluid charge, app setup, programming, and commissioning
price_range.excludes: Electrical circuit installation (by licensed electrician), any required drainage correction, permit fees, landscape restoration beyond trenching backfill

services.name: Commercial Event Fog System
services.description: Temporary or semi-permanent fog installations for commercial event venues, wedding venues, hospitality properties, and themed entertainment spaces. Modular design allows scaled deployment for single events or seasonal operation.

specifications.coverage_area: Up to 15,000 square feet with modular manifold sections
specifications.fluid_type: Pharma-grade propylene glycol blend, non-toxic, event-safe, leaves no residue
specifications.deployment_type: Surface-mounted manifold with weighted bases — no trenching required for temporary installations
specifications.power_requirements: Varies by scale — minimum 30-amp 240V for venues up to 5,000 sq ft

eligibility.temporary_installation_requirements: Venue must provide 240V power within 100 feet of deployment zone and water access within 75 feet
eligibility.permit_note: Commercial installations may require local event or temporary structure permits — Nimbus assists with documentation but the venue is responsible for permit acquisition

price_range.single_event_rental: $1,800 to $6,500 depending on coverage area and duration

services.typical_installation_time: 1 day for temporary event setup, 5 to 10 days for permanent commercial

services.name: Annual Maintenance Plan
services.description: Comprehensive preventive maintenance for installed Nimbus fog systems. Includes two scheduled service visits per year (spring activation and fall winterization), fluid replenishment, nozzle inspection and cleaning, manifold pressure testing, control unit diagnostics, and firmware updates for smart systems.

fall_visit_includes: control unit power-down and weather cover
specifications.response_time_for_issues: 48 hours for non-emergency service calls during operating season (March through November)

eligibility.available_for: Any Nimbus-installed system within the DFW service area
eligibility.not_available_for: Systems installed by other companies, systems outside the DFW metroplex, or systems that have been modified by unlicensed third parties

price_range.commercial_system: Custom quote based on system scale

services.name: Fog System Calibration Service
services.description: On-site recalibration of fog depth, density, dispersal pattern, and timing for existing Nimbus installations. Typically requested after landscape changes, seasonal adjustments, or when the homeowner wants to modify the aesthetic effect.

eligibility.not_available_for: Systems not installed by Nimbus, or systems with unresolved maintenance issues

services.name: Site Assessment & Feasibility Survey
services.description: On-site evaluation to determine whether a property meets the requirements for a Nimbus fog system installation. Includes grade measurement, drainage assessment, setback verification, electrical and water access evaluation, and a written feasibility report with recommendations.

specifications.deliverable: Written feasibility report within 3 business days, including site diagram, recommended system type, zone layout, and any prerequisite work required
tools_used: RF meter for Wi-Fi signal strength (Premium systems)

price_range.residential: $150, credited toward installation if the project proceeds
price_range.commercial: $350, credited toward installation if the project proceeds
